name: validate-source-file: --check-registry-link verifies source.id maps to an entry in the referenced registry
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  authoritative_url: "https://a.com"
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
  content_hash: "sha256:S"
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > file.yaml

printf 'src-other:
  publisher: B
  url: "https://b.com"
  license: MIT
  last_verified: 2026-05-04
' > STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
